title: Xtra Crunchy Malaysian Manchego Flatbread
description: A rich and crunchy Malaysian dish featuring manchego cheese, perfect for a post-workout snack, made with long-fermentation dough and low-calorie friendly ingredients, served in a terracotta dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine whole wheat flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it ferment for 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle.
Place the dough in a terracotta dish and brush it with olive oil.
Sprinkle shredded manchego cheese, sesame seeds, and chopped scallions over the dough.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until it is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
